root_text.an5.293:1.1: “Pañcahi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato ājīvako yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ niraye.
root_text.an5.293:1.3: Pāṇātipātī hoti, adinnādāyī hoti, abrahmacārī hoti, musāvādī hoti, surāmerayamajjapamādaṭṭhāyī hoti.
root_text.an5.293:1.4: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahi dhammehi samannāgato ājīvako yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ niraye”ti.

translation_text.an5.293:1.1: “Mendicants, an Ājīvaka ascetic with five qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there.
translation_text.an5.293:1.3: They kill living creatures, steal, have sex, lie, and consume beer, wine, and liquor intoxicants.
translation_text.an5.293:1.4: An Ājīvaka ascetic with these five qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there.”
